---
title: "A Dominican Artist: A Sketch of the Life of the Rev. Père Besson of the Order of St. Dominic"
---

## A Dominican Artist: A Sketch of the Life of the Rev. Père Besson of the Order of St. Dominic

**Author:** Henrietta Louisa Lear
**Date:** 1870
**Imprint:** London: Rivington

### Notes

See also [[person:859]Henrietta Lear].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
